description: Phase 38: Staging & Production Cutover - Enhance existing Terraform staging/production, add canary deployment to Helm chart, create backup verification, synthetic monitoring, and ArgoCD production application set.
steps: Enhance infra/terraform/environments/production/main.tf to add multi-region support (us-east-1 primary, eu-west-1 secondary), cross-region replication for RDS and S3, Route53 health checks with failover routing
Create infra/terraform/modules/backup-verification/ with: main.tf (AWS Backup vault, backup plan with daily/weekly/monthly schedules, restore testing via Lambda), variables.tf, outputs.tf
Create infra/terraform/modules/synthetic-monitoring/ with: main.tf (CloudWatch Synthetics canaries for all service endpoints, 72h green threshold tracking, alerting), variables.tf, outputs.tf
Update infra/terraform/environments/staging/main.tf to include backup-verification and synthetic-monitoring modules
Update infra/terraform/environments/production/main.tf to include backup-verification, synthetic-monitoring, and multi-region modules
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/canary.yaml with Argo Rollouts canary strategy (1% -> 10% -> 50% -> 100% with analysis templates, automatic rollback on error rate > 1%)
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/analysis-template.yaml for canary analysis (success rate, latency p99, error rate metrics from Prometheus)

Update infra/helm/quant-platform/values-production.yaml to add: multi-region config, canary deployment settings, real domain (quant.app) with TLS, increased replica counts, production-grade resource limits
Create infra/argocd/applicationset.yaml (if not existing, enhance) with ApplicationSet for multi-environment (staging + production) with progressive sync
Create infra/scripts/backup-verify.sh script that validates backup restoration (checks DB snapshot restore, S3 object integrity, reports pass/fail)
Create infra/scripts/canary-promote.sh script for manual canary promotion steps
Create infra/docs/staging-cutover-runbook.md documenting: Terraform apply steps, Helm deploy via ArgoCD, TLS cert provisioning, synthetic monitor setup, 72h green verification, dogfooding checklist
Create infra/docs/production-cutover-runbook.md documenting: multi-region deploy, canary rollout steps, backup verification, rollback procedures
acceptance_criteria: Terraform staging config includes backup verification and synthetic monitoring
Terraform production config adds multi-region support
Helm chart includes canary deployment with Argo Rollouts strategy
Analysis template defines success criteria (error rate, latency)
Backup verification script exists and is documented
Production values specify real domain with TLS
Runbooks document the full cutover process
pnpm typecheck and pnpm build still pass (infra changes dont break TS)
findings: All infra files created and verified. Prettier auto-formatted YAML/JSON files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. pnpm typecheck/build/test all pass (98 test suites, 95 typecheck tasks, 70 build tasks). The monitoring module exposes sns_topic_arn which is referenced by the new modules.
